title: wikitext
description: The WikiText dataset is a collection of over 100 million tokens extracted from verified Good and Featured articles on Wikipedia, available under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike License. It is used for language modeling tasks and is significantly larger than the Penn Treebank dataset. The dataset is available in different sizes, including WikiText-2 and WikiText-103. It can be used for training and evaluating language models.
subjects: language modeling, natural language processing, Wikipedia, text dataset
creator: Salesforce
